rationale: LLP name at top of body. Domestic LLP — uses entity.name (not entity.home_jurisdiction_name).

label_verbatim: FIRST: On ___ (date) the Secretary of State filed a document delivered for filing by the undersigned limited liability partnership entitled: ___
rationale: Single-line widget for the date the original (incorrect) document was filed. The blank for the document's title ('partnership entitled: ___', e.g., 'Certificate of Limited Liability Partnership' / 'Certificate of Amendment') is visually present but has NO AcroForm widget on this template — see open_questions for upstream template bug.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The inaccuracy or defect to be corrected is described as follows:
rationale: Large multi-line text box (rect ~118pt high) for free-text description of the inaccuracy or defect. SECOND ('Said document is an inaccurate record...') is recital-only and has no widget.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The portion of the said document to be corrected is corrected to read in its entirety as follows:
rationale: Large multi-line text box (rect ~114pt high) for the corrected text that replaces the defective portion of the original document. The drafter's swap of Text3/Text4 is corrected here.

label_verbatim: Partner(s)* ... (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity widget for individual-partner signature. Shape D. Footnote *Certificate MUST be signed by at least one partner OR by any duly authorized person (31 MRSA §826.1.B or 2). Used when the signer is a natural-person partner.

label_verbatim: For Partner(s) which are Entities — Name of Entity ___
rationale: Name of the entity-partner when the signer is a corporate/LLC partner rather than a natural person. Parallel block to the individual-partner block above. Same shape as NP_MNPCA-6's incorporator_entity_N.name and MLPA-6's general_partner_entity_N.name.

label_verbatim: For Partner(s) which are Entities — By ___ (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of the entity-partner. Same primitive as the per-officer-signer-pattern's `<role>_entity_N.signer_printed_name_and_capacity`, applied here under filing.signer_entity.* (since the filer is an existing entity, not a formation-time role-keyed originator).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1; universal handle for entity name on this filing.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees ($50 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
